location: Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
general_information: Front desk operates 24 hours a day.
The hotel is located 8 km from Mumbai International Airport.
Complimentary WiFi is available throughout the property.
Free luggage storage is available before check-in and after check-out.
Currency exchange services are available at the front desk.
rooms: Standard Room costs ₹4500 per night and accommodates 2 guests.
Standard Room includes complimentary WiFi, television, minibar, and work desk.
Deluxe Room costs ₹7000 per night and accommodates 3 guests.
Deluxe Room includes city-view windows and a king-size bed.
Executive Room costs ₹9500 per night and includes executive lounge access.
Executive Room accommodates up to 3 guests.
Executive Suite costs ₹12000 per night and accommodates 4 guests.
Executive Suite includes separate living and sleeping areas.
Family Suite costs ₹15000 per night and accommodates 5 guests.
amenities: The rooftop infinity pool operates from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM.
The fitness center operates 24 hours a day.
Spa services are available from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
Steam room access is complimentary for hotel guests.
Sauna access is complimentary for hotel guests.
Business center operates 24 hours a day.
Meeting rooms are available upon reservation.
High-speed WiFi is complimentary.
Laundry service is available daily.
Dry cleaning service is available.
Daily housekeeping is provided.
Valet parking is available.
EV charging stations are available in the parking area.
Airport transfer service is available.
Doctor on call is available.
Wheelchair assistance is available.
Babysitting service can be arranged upon request.
Wake-up call service is available.
Luggage assistance is available.
Room service is available 24 hours a day.
restaurants: Harbor Kitchen serves breakfast from 7:00 AM to 10:30 AM.
Harbor Kitchen serves lunch from 12:00 PM to 3:00 PM.
Harbor Kitchen serves dinner from 7:00 PM to 11:00 PM.
Sky Lounge operates from 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM.
The hotel offers vegetarian and vegan dining options.
In-room dining is available 24 hours a day.
Special dietary requests can be accommodated.
policies: Cancellation is free up to 48 hours before arrival.
Cancellations within 48 hours incur a one-night charge.
No-show reservations incur a one-night charge.
Children under 6 years stay free when sharing existing bedding.
Pets are not allowed on the hotel premises.
Registered service dogs and guide dogs are permitted with valid documentation.
Smoking is prohibited inside guest rooms and indoor public areas.
A deep cleaning fee of ₹10000 will be charged for smoking violations inside guest rooms.
Smoking is permitted only in designated outdoor areas.
Valid government-issued identification is required at check-in.
Late check-out is subject to availability.
Late check-out between 12:00 PM and 3:00 PM incurs a 50% half-day room charge.
Late check-out after 3:00 PM incurs a full-night room charge.
Early check-in is subject to availability.
Security deposit may be required during check-in.
Guests must be at least 18 years old to check in.
transportation: Mumbai International Airport is approximately 20 minutes away by car.
Metro station is located 500 meters from the hotel.
Taxi booking assistance is available through the concierge.
Private chauffeur service can be arranged.
Car rental services are available upon request.
payments: The hotel accepts American Express cards.
Invoices can be provided upon request.
services: Conference facilities support up to 300 attendees.
Printing and scanning services are available.
Lost and found assistance is available.
faq: WiFi is free throughout the hotel.
The hotel has a rooftop swimming pool.
The gym operates 24 hours a day.
Extra beds are available for ₹1500 per night.
The hotel does not allow pets.
